description_long: This house features a minimalist, modern cubic design with clean white exterior walls and sharp geometric lines. The structure is composed of two main stacked volumes, with the upper level slightly offset and featuring a glass balcony railing. The front facade includes a recessed entryway with a wooden door and a small overhang, while the rear showcases a rectangular pool set into a black platform base. Windows are sparse and strategically placed, including a prominent horizontal window above the pool and a glass section adjacent to the balcony. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing simplicity and open space. The house sits on a flat, dark plinth that contrasts with the bright exterior.
description: A modern, cubic white house with a glass balcony, wooden entry door, and a rear pool set on a dark platform. The design is minimalist with clean lines and sparse windows.
description_view_0: Front view shows the recessed wooden entry door, a small overhang, and the glass balcony above.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the glass balcony, upper-level door, and the start of the rear pool beneath the overhanging structure.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the rectangular pool, the overhanging upper volume, and a large horizontal window.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays a single horizontal window and the solid white facade with minimal openings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large horizontal windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a wooden door, small overhang, and no porch or decorative columns
